addons.name: SyncFolder
addons.author: PrismLauncher +
addons.description: Keeps a chosen folder in sync across all instances.
addons.longDescription: Mirrors a chosen folder across all of your instances, so a file saved while playing one version is available in every other. Pick which folder to sync from the settings page: shaders, resource packs, schematics or worlds. The newest copy of each file always wins.
